description: Sign Permit — processes sign permit applications, validates sign code compliance including size, height, illumination, and location restrictions

hard_stops.label: Sign Exceeds Maximum Area
hard_stops.logic: Proposed sign area exceeds the maximum permitted for this zoning district and frontage — must reduce or obtain variance

hard_stops.label: Sign in Public Right-of-Way
hard_stops.logic: Proposed sign location encroaches into the public right-of-way without an encroachment permit

soft_flags.label: Digital/Electronic Sign
soft_flags.logic: Proposed sign is digital or electronic — verify compliance with brightness, animation, and message duration restrictions
